title: Measure irrigation delivery system performance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Measure irrigation delivery system performance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Measure irrigation system performance

pcs.text: Measure and record system pressures, water flow rates and pump performance parameters according to measuring and recording procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and record system pressures, water flow rates and pump performance parameters according to measuring and recording procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and record system pressures, water flow rates and pump performance parameters according to measuring and recording procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record variations where relevant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record variations where relevant.

pcs.text: Inspect distribution and delivery systems, identify and fix malfunctions in system and record actions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect distribution and delivery systems, identify and fix malfunctions in system and record actions.

pcs.text: Identify and record factors external to the system that may cause interference
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record factors external to the system that may cause interference?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record factors external to the system that may cause interference.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of irrigation system performance measurement activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of irrigation system performance measurement activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of irrigation system performance measurement activities.
